title: INSANIO
description:
Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

GameplayPrepare your drop squad by swapping weapons, vehicles, and pilots to your liking. Select a mission and choose your deployment area on the map. From that moment on, it is hands off. You can only watch as your units try to accomplish their task. Every pilot has their own traits affecting their behaviour. While lost equipment can be retrieved from the battlefield, fallen pilots are lost for good. So take care of them if you want to win.  New equipment is rewarded for successful missions.

Features• Pilots with unique traits

• Customizable vehicles

• Various vehicle modules

• Magnificent procedural generation of fully destructible terrain

• Explosions

• Almost clever ai
description_short: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.
